player_notes.jalen williams: Williams is sidelined (out) for OKC. Ajay Mitchell has stepped up as a key playmaker in his absence, recording 24 pts/10 ast in Game 3.
player_notes.victor wembanyama: Wembanyama was ejected in Game 4 and faces a potential suspension for Game 5 (elbow on Naz Reid). Monitor availability — if suspended, massive minutes/usage shift for remaining Spurs.
player_notes.og anunoby: Anunoby ruled out for Game 4 with a strained right hamstring; remains day-to-day. Knicks series is over (sweep), so only relevant if he plays in ECF.

game_notes.SAS vs MIN: Wembanyama faces potential suspension for Game 5 after ejection in Game 4; his absence would significantly boost usage/minutes for remaining Spurs and Wolves bigs.
game_notes.OKC vs LAL: Jalen Williams remains out; Ajay Mitchell is filling a star role (24 pts, 10 ast in Game 3). Thunder lead 3-0.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: The season context document contains no R2 series diary for NYK vs PHI, and the playoff bracket shows PHI advanced from R1. The context ends with PHI winning R1 over BOS 4-3.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Multiple news items confirm the Knicks have swept the 76ers in R2 (4-0), with a 144-114 blowout in Game 4 on May 10. NYK is now in the Eastern Conference Finals. PHI is eliminated.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Add NYK vs PHI R2 series diary. Mark PHI as eliminated. Update NYK status to ECF. Note: OG Anunoby was OUT for Game 4 with a strained right hamstring (day-to-day per news item). NYK swept PHI 4-0.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: No injury note for Anunoby in the playoff injury landscape beyond his R1 series diary appearances.

suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Add Anunoby strained right hamstring to the active injury landscape. Flag as day-to-day heading into ECF. Note he was OUT for NYK-PHI R2 G4.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: The context document contains no R2 series diary for SAS vs MIN. The playoff bracket and R1 results confirm both teams advanced, but no R2 games are recorded.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News items confirm this series is in progress and now tied 2-2. Game 4 result: MIN 114, SAS 109. Victor Wembanyama was ejected from Game 4 for elbowing Naz Reid in the jaw early in the second quarter. Anthony Edwards scored 36 points (16 in Q4) to lead MIN. Stephen A. Smith is calling for a suspension for Wembanyama for Game 5.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Create SAS vs MIN R2 series diary. Record series tied 2-2. Note Wembanyama ejected in G4 for elbowing Naz Reid — first career ejection. Flag Wembanyama as facing potential suspension for G5 (not confirmed, but being discussed). Note Edwards returned and played a full starring role (36 pts), updating his injury status from the left knee concern documented in R1.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: Playoff Injury Landscape states Edwards was OUT for G5 (DEN series) with left knee injury and remained OUT for G6 (series clincher). 'Edwards' left knee status and recovery timeline are the defining MIN variables heading into R2.'
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News items confirm Edwards scored 36 points in R2 Game 4 vs SAS (MIN 114-109), with 16 of those points in the fourth quarter. He is clearly available and performing at a high level in R2.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update Edwards' injury status: left knee is no longer a limiting factor. He is active and productive in R2. Remove the 'defining MIN variable' uncertainty framing and treat as healthy unless new information emerges.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: Playoff Injury Landscape states: 'Treat as fully healthy entering R2. No injury concern.' R1 series diary G5 entry notes: 'the SAS floor compression pattern held for POR throughout the series.'
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Wembanyama was ejected from R2 Game 4 vs MIN for elbowing Naz Reid in the jaw. He faces a potential league suspension for Game 5 per Stephen A. Smith's commentary and the news headline describing this as warranting a suspension.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Flag Wembanyama as facing potential suspension for R2 G5 vs MIN. This is not yet confirmed but is being actively discussed. Add to injury/availability landscape as a critical variable. Note: if suspended, SAS would play G5 without their franchise player — analogous to the G2/G3 concussion situation in R1.
